mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_by AS "updateBy.id", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.gen_table_id AS "genTableId", a.source_mode AS "sourceMode", a.source_sql AS "sourceSql", a.schedule_cron AS "scheduleCron", a.unique_keys AS "uniqueKeys", a.sync_strategy AS "syncStrategy", a.enabled AS "enabled", a.partition_keys AS "partitionKeys", a.bucket_keys AS "bucketKeys", a.edit_open_mode AS "editOpenMode", a.list_description AS "listDescription", a.extend_json AS "extendJson", a.last_run_time AS "lastRunTime", a.last_run_status AS "lastRunStatus", a.last_run_message AS "lastRunMessage"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM gen_table_derive_config a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM gen_table_derive_config a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.gen_table_id = #{genTableId} ORDER BY a.update_date DESC, a.create_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM gen_table_derive_config a WHERE a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} ORDER BY a.update_date DESC, a.create_date DESC

SELECT
FROM gen_table_derive_config a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.enabled = '1' AND a.source_mode = 'async_summary' ORDER BY a.update_date DESC, a.create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gen_table_derive_config( id, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, remarks, del_flag, gen_table_id, source_mode, source_sql, schedule_cron, unique_keys, sync_strategy, enabled, partition_keys, bucket_keys, edit_open_mode, list_description, extend_json, last_run_time, last_run_status, last_run_message ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{createBy.id}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy.id}, #{updateDate}, #{remarks}, #{delFlag}, #{genTableId}, #{sourceMode}, #{sourceSql}, #{scheduleCron}, #{uniqueKeys}, #{syncStrategy}, #{enabled}, #{partitionKeys}, #{bucketKeys}, #{editOpenMode}, #{listDescription}, #{extendJson}, #{lastRunTime}, #{lastRunStatus}, #{lastRunMessage} )
mapper.update: UPDATE gen_table_derive_config SET update_by = #{updateBy.id}, update_date = #{updateDate}, remarks = #{remarks}, gen_table_id = #{genTableId}, source_mode = #{sourceMode}, source_sql = #{sourceSql}, schedule_cron = #{scheduleCron}, unique_keys = #{uniqueKeys}, sync_strategy = #{syncStrategy}, enabled = #{enabled}, partition_keys = #{partitionKeys}, bucket_keys = #{bucketKeys}, edit_open_mode = #{editOpenMode}, list_description = #{listDescription}, extend_json = #{extendJson}, last_run_time = #{lastRunTime}, last_run_status = #{lastRunStatus}, last_run_message = #{lastRunMessage} WHERE id = #{id}
